faqs.question: Where is CSE Lab?
faqs.answer: The CSE Lab is located on the Ground Floor. From the entrance, walk straight; the CSE Lab is on the right-hand side, Academic IT Block.

faqs.question: Where is IT Lab?
faqs.answer: The IT Lab is located on the 3rd Floor. From the entrance, walk straight and take the stairs; the IT Lab is on the left-hand side, Academic IT Block.

faqs.question: Where is Electronics Lab?
faqs.answer: The ELEX Lab is located on the 1st Floor. From the entrance, take the left staircase, turn left, walk straight; the lab is on the right-hand side, Academic IT Block.

faqs.question: Where is the Seminar Hall?
faqs.answer: The main Seminar Hall is on the Ground Floor near the main entrance. It seats 150 students with projector and sound system. There are 8 seminar halls across the campus.

faqs.question: Who is the CSE HOD?
faqs.answer: The HOD of the CSE Department is Mr. Manmohan. Cabin: Left-hand side from the entrance, second room, Ground Floor, Academic IT Block.

faqs.question: Who is the IT HOD?
faqs.answer: The HOD of the IT Department is Mr. Jagdhish Chandra Pandey. Cabin: Right-hand side from the entrance, Ground Floor, Academic IT Block.

faqs.question: Who is the ELEX HOD?
faqs.answer: The HOD of the ELEX Department is Mr. Manoj Rikhari. Cabin: From the entrance, take the left staircase and reach in front of the cabin, 1st Floor, Academic IT Block.

faqs.question: Who are the CSE lecturers?
faqs.answer: CSE lecturers are Mr. Virendra Dharamshaktu and Mr. Neeraj Arya. Cabin: Left-hand side from the entrance, second room, Ground Floor, Academic IT Block.

faqs.question: Who are the IT lecturers?
faqs.answer: IT lecturers are Ms. Neha Bohra and Mr. Ashok Kumar. Cabin: Left-hand side from the entrance, third room, Ground Floor, Academic IT Block.

faqs.question: Who are the ELEX lecturers?
faqs.answer: ELEX lecturers are Mr. Pankaj Kumar and Mr. Rashid. Cabin: 1st Floor. From the entrance, take the left staircase and reach the cabins on the left second and third room, Academic IT Block.

faqs.question: Where are the classrooms?
faqs.answer: Classrooms are arranged department-wise and year-wise. IT 2nd Year: Ground Floor - Room 1. CSE 2nd Year: Ground Floor - Room 1. ELEX 2nd Year: 1st Floor - Drone Lab. IT 3rd Year: Ground Floor - Room 4. CSE 3rd Year: Ground Floor - Room 4. ELEX 3rd Year: 1st Floor - Room 6.

faqs.question: How many labs are there?
faqs.answer: There are 12 labs in the IT Block: Computer Lab A & B (CSE), Networking Lab, AI/ML Research Lab, Electronics Lab (×2), IoT Lab, Robotics Lab, Communication Lab, and 2 Project Labs. Open 8 AM–6 PM weekdays.

faqs.question: How do I view my timetable?
faqs.answer: Log in to your Student Dashboard and click 'Timetable' to see your full weekly class and lab schedule by semester and branch.

faqs.question: Where can I view my unit test marks?
faqs.answer: Go to Student Dashboard → 'Unit Test Marks'. You'll see marks for all subjects by test and semester. Marks are uploaded by faculty via CSV.

faqs.question: Where can I view semester exam results?
faqs.answer: AIMS does not store university marksheets. Go to Dashboard → 'Semester Results' for the direct link to the official university result portal.

faqs.question: How do I raise a complaint?
faqs.answer: Log in → Student Dashboard → 'Complaints' → click '+ New Ticket'. Report infrastructure, academic, or facility issues. You'll get a unique ticket ID to track status.

faqs.question: Where can I find study resources?
faqs.answer: Study materials are in 'Resources' in your Student Dashboard. Faculty upload PDFs, slides, and lab manuals. Filter by subject and semester.

faqs.question: How do I get my digital ID card?
faqs.answer: Your Digital ID Card is in Student Dashboard → 'ID Card'. Upload your photo, view the card with roll number and branch, and download a PDF copy.

faqs.question: Which departments are in the IT Block?
faqs.answer: The IT Block has 3 engineering departments: CSE (480 students), IT (360 students), and ELEX (320 students). Each has dedicated labs, faculty, and an HOD cabin.

faqs.question: How do I create an AIMS account?
faqs.answer: Click 'Create Account' on the homepage. Choose Student or Teacher. Students need roll number + branch. Teachers need a special access key from the administration office.

faqs.question: Where can I find notices?
faqs.answer: Notices are on the homepage Notice Board. After login, personalized notices and notifications appear in your dashboard.

faqs.question: Hello!
faqs.answer: Hello! Welcome to AIMS — the Academic Infrastructure Management System. I can help you find labs, locate HOD cabins, navigate the IT Block, or learn about faculty, timetables, and student services. What would you like to know?

defaultResponse: I'm not sure about that. Try asking about: labs, HOD cabin, faculty, timetables, marks, complaints, or ID cards. Or contact the admin office for further help.
greeting: Hi! I'm the AIMS Assistant — your campus navigation guide. Ask me where anything is, or about student services!
